description: §12.5 — the same server function returning a struct of JSON-serializable fields (`Item = { id: int, name: string }`) fires no E-ROUTE-003. The clean control: a struct of serializable fields crosses the wire fine.
rationale: §12.5 wire-serializability gate (return direction): the gate recurses struct fields; every field of `Item` is a serializable primitive, so the return type is transmittable and E-ROUTE-003 stays silent.
